Class SecuritycurrencyMailContextVerifier

java.lang.Object
grafioschtrader.service.SecuritycurrencyMailContextVerifier
All Implemented Interfaces:
IMailUserToUserContextVerifier
@Component public class SecuritycurrencyMailContextVerifier extends Object implements IMailUserToUserContextVerifier
Context verifier for an initial user-to-user message started from a security or currency pair (e.g. the watchlist "mail to creator" action). A non-privileged user may contact the creator of a security only when both hold: the recipient really is the security's creator, and the security is on a watchlist owned by the sender's tenant. The latter blunts forgery: a sender cannot message the creator of an arbitrary security they never added.

  • Method Details

    • supports

      public boolean supports(String contextEntity)
      Description copied from interface: IMailUserToUserContextVerifier
      Indicates whether this verifier handles the given context entity type.
      Specified by:
      supports in interface IMailUserToUserContextVerifier
      Parameters:
      contextEntity - the context entity-type key sent with the message (e.g. "Securitycurrency")
      Returns:
      true if this verifier is responsible for the given context entity type

    • verify

      public void verify(User fromUser, Integer idUserTo, Integer idEntityContext)
      Description copied from interface: IMailUserToUserContextVerifier
      Verifies that the sender may legitimately start a direct message to the given recipient from the referenced context entity. Implementations throw a SecurityException when the context does not justify the message (e.g. recipient is not the entity's creator, or the sender has no legitimate relationship to the entity).
      Specified by:
      verify in interface IMailUserToUserContextVerifier
      Parameters:
      fromUser - the user initiating the message
      idUserTo - the intended recipient
      idEntityContext - the id of the context entity referenced by the message
